landing.module2_desc: Dashboard for parents with progress, resources, and forum
landing.module3_desc: Smart intermediary with AI and matchmaking

dashboard.subtitle: Your personal space to track your academic progress
dashboard.important_task: You have 1 important task pending for tomorrow. Keep up the good pace and keep earning XP.
dashboard.unlock: You unlock Advanced Logic in 2 activities.

login.subtitle: Access your personalized UTP vocational guidance portal
login.desc_register: Fill in your details to register.

login.already_have: Already have an account? Log in
login.no_account: Don't have an account? Sign up for free

familia.title: Parents Portal
familia.subtitle: Accompany your child on their professional path easily and accessibly
familia.voice_desc: Designed with large buttons and voice explanations for your comfort.
familia.link_desc: To see their progress, tasks, and recommendations, we need you to enter their unique code.
familia.where_code: Where do I find this code?
familia.where_code_desc: Your child can find their 12-character code (e.g., NEX-ALE-2026) in their student profile within the NEXUS platform.
familia.link_desc: To see your child's progress, enter their assigned unique code.
familia.where_code: Where do I find the code?
familia.where_code_desc: The student can see their personal code in the top right of their home dashboard.
familia.status_msg_student: Alejandro has been very active this week. He completed all his tasks on time.
familia.status_msg_applicant: Camila is progressing with her application process at a good pace.
familia.timeline_desc: Accompany your child in every step of their development
familia.faqs_title: Frequently Asked Questions Suggested by AI

messages.err_invalid_code: Invalid code. Please verify the code (e.g. NEX-ALE-2026).
messages.success_linked: Excellent! You have successfully linked your child.
messages.voice_welcome_unlinked: Welcome. Please type the eight-digit code of your child in the center box to see their progress.
messages.voice_welcome_linked: Welcome back. You are viewing the progress of your child {name}. You can click the questions to listen to more details.

familia.student_status: {name} is on a very good track!
familia.student_next_task: Talk 15 minutes in a video call with their vocational tutor.
familia.applicant_next_task: Upload their high school study certificate.

milestones.s1_d: We defined Alejandro's goals to choose his career.
milestones.s2_d: He completed his first tastes and preferences test.
milestones.s3_d: He identified his talents in logic and math.
milestones.s4_d: He will talk 15 minutes on a video call to resolve doubts.
milestones.s5_d: He will decide the final career to start his application.
milestones.a1_d: Camila completed the evaluation with 95% in Systems Engineering.
milestones.a2_d: The study plan adapted to her vocational profile was generated.
milestones.a3_d: Missing upload of high school study certificate for evaluation.
milestones.a4_d: Attend the campus chat about scholarships and financing.

faqs.s1_a: He's doing great! He has completed 3 out of 5 major steps and has an overall progress of 68%.
faqs.s1_v: Your son Alejandro is doing great. He has completed three out of five major steps.
faqs.s2_a: It recommends Systems Engineering, because he stands out in data analysis and technology.
faqs.s2_v: We recommend Systems Engineering. Alejandro shows great skill for technology.
faqs.s3_a: He needs to have the chat with his vocational tutor online and make the final choice.
faqs.s3_v: He has pending to chat with his vocational tutor and make the final decision.
faqs.a1_q: How did the Vocational Test go?
faqs.a1_a: Very well! It determined a 95% affinity with the Systems Engineering career.
faqs.a1_v: It went excellently. The intelligent system calculated ninety-five percent affinity with Systems Engineering.
faqs.a2_a: She must send her high school study certificate to validate her direct entry.
faqs.a2_v: The next step is to send her school study certificate to ensure her preferential entry.

resources.r1_d: Simple manual with questions to talk with your child.
resources.r2_d: How to organize a quiet place for your child to study.

progreso.title: Grades and Progress
progreso.subtitle: See in detail what your child has advanced in NEXUS
progreso.assistant_desc: We explain everything step by step, with large font and audio reading.
progreso.what_studying: What topics is my child studying?
progreso.studying_desc: NEXUS divides the path into 6 topics. Below you see the details of each one.
progreso.estimated_time: Estimated: It will take 30 minutes to finish.

modules.m1_desc: Help your child discover what they like, what they value, and what they are good at.
modules.m2_desc: Explore which real-world jobs and professions appeal to them the most.
modules.m3_desc: Test to know what they excel at (numbers, words, art, logic, etc.).
modules.m4_desc: Analyze how they behave and solve everyday problems.
modules.m5_desc: Allows your child to virtually 'test' what a workday is like in each profession.
modules.m6_desc: The summary of their entire path where they choose their definitive career.

testVocacional.title: NEXUS Vocational Test
testVocacional.subtitle: Intelligent UTP Orientation
testVocacional.welcome_desc: NEXUS helps you discover which career best aligns with your talents, passions, and lifestyle using Artificial Intelligence.

features.f1_desc: It will only take 3 to 5 minutes to complete.

testVocacional.select_option_desc: Select the alternative you identify with the most.

ai_messages.m1: NEXUS AI is analyzing the frequency of your decision patterns...
ai_messages.m2: Evaluating competencies against the UTP academic curriculum...

result.title: Your Vocational Recommendation
result.desc: Based on your problem-solving choices and interests, NEXUS recommends the following academic option.
result.key_skills: Skills that stand out in your profile:
result.btn_save_go: Save to Profile & Go to Dashboard

q1.title: What kind of activities do you enjoy doing most in your free time?
q1.o1: Create web pages, program, or disassemble and understand technological devices
q1.o2: Draw plans, design models, or plan the decoration and distribution of spaces
q1.o3: Plan an entrepreneurship, devise ways to sell products, or lead work teams
q1.o4: Talk about emotions, actively listen to others' problems and advise them

q2.title: In a school group project, what role do you naturally prefer to take on?
q2.o1: Solve the most complex logical problems, structure data, or automate tasks
q2.o2: Design the visual presentation, make aesthetic schemes, and care for project symmetry
q2.o3: Coordinate delivery times, delegate responsibilities, and present final results
q2.o4: Ensure all group members feel included and mediate in case of arguments

q3.title: If you had unlimited resources to solve a real-world problem, what would you do?
q3.o1: Create a platform with Artificial Intelligence to optimize global health and education
q3.o2: Plan and build eco-friendly districts and sustainable housing with green areas
q3.o3: Create a business incubator that helps thousands of entrepreneurs expand their companies
q3.o4: Implement accessible community mental health and therapy centers for the entire population

q4.title: What kind of reading, articles, or videos catch your attention most on networks?
q4.o1: New technologies, cybersecurity, robotics, gadgets, and AI advancements
q4.o2: Modern architecture, historical structures, interior design trends, or 3D modeling
q4.o3: Marketing strategies, startup success stories, personal finance, and investments
q4.o4: Brain behavior, consumer psychology, interpersonal relationships, or mental health

q5.title: What kind of problems do you feel most motivated to deal with and solve?
q5.o1: A software bug in a program or the need to automate a repetitive process
q5.o2: The uncomfortable layout of a physical environment or lack of safe recreation spaces
q5.o3: A local business suffering economic losses or inefficient organizational processes
q5.o4: A person in your environment going through a situation of stress, sadness, or personal crisis

careers.sistemas_desc: You show a high preference for logical analysis, information technology, and software solutions development. You are ideal to lead digital transformation through algorithms, databases, and AI.
careers.arquitectura_desc: You stand out for your sense of spatial design, 3D modeling, and aesthetic planning. You have an ideal profile to design and build functional, sustainable spaces integrated into the community.
careers.administracion_desc: Your decisions reflect strategic vision, leadership skills, and a high sense for commercial management. You are ready to lead projects, optimize business resources, and found innovative startups.
careers.psicologia_desc: You have a profile oriented towards human well-being, empathy, and understanding behavior. You are excellent at listening and mediating, making you ideal for clinical, educational, or HR psychology.
